name: get_timezone
description: Get current date, time, and timezone information for a location. Accepts a timezone name, IP address, geographic coordinates, or airport code (IATA/ICAO). If no parameter is provided, the caller's IP is used to determine the timezone.

parameters.name: tz
parameters.description: IANA timezone name (e.g., 'America/New_York'). Use this OR one of the other location parameters.

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: IPv4 or IPv6 address to determine timezone from.

parameters.name: lat
parameters.description: Latitude coordinate. Must be used together with 'long'.

parameters.name: long
parameters.description: Longitude coordinate. Must be used together with 'lat'.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Address or place name to determine timezone from.
